description: Thematic macro/industry indicator panels. Broadly ingested context, consumed narrowly by tagged holdings. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing only; they never auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR (human review promotes to base case).

sources.eia: https://api.eia.gov/v2 (requires EIA_API_KEY; degrades gracefully when absent)

ai_power_land.label: AI compute -> power demand -> grid/water constraint -> scarce Permian surface
ai_power_land.description: Demand chain behind land/surface/water optionality (TPL water, LB easements, WBI infra, APLD hosting). Hyperscaler capex is the upstream pulse; power and gas prices and Permian activity are the midstream signals.

series.label: Hyperscaler capex guide (USD bn, latest)
series.note: Derived from ai_overlay in GOOGL/AMZN/META/MSFT valuation.json; filing-cited
